features.name: Static data pipeline
features.description: Fetch or accept CSV, normalize records, validate coordinates, and generate static hotspot, summary, and report JSON
features.evidence: npm run data:convert: 3297 records, 3297 valid coordinates, 12 outside Taipei

features.name: Bilingual hotspot explorer
features.description: Clustered map, nearby search, directory, filters, Chinese default, English fallback, and Google Maps links
features.evidence: Browser QA passed map, filters, language toggle, 48-card directory page, and outside-Taipei filtering

features.name: Overview and PWA
features.description: Dataset dashboard, data notes, manifest, scoped service-worker cache, and GitHub Pages deployment
features.evidence: Production build succeeds; dashboard shows filtered totals; PWA assets are emitted to dist

features.name: Quality and handoff
features.description: Tests, code review fixes, documentation, agent harness, and reproducible verification
features.evidence: 14 tests pass, TypeScript/Vite build passes, npm audit reports 0 vulnerabilities, harness validates 100/100
